data.title: TASE to release third quarter 2025 results on Nov 11 after market close. Tel Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd (TASE: TASE).
data.description: Tel Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, with the ticker symbol TASE, has revealed that its financial reports for the period until September 30, 2025, are scheduled to be released on November 11, 2025, post the market closure. Investors can look forward to gaining insights into the company's performance by reviewing these financial statements, which will provide vital information for the specified period. Stay tuned for the detailed financial updates from TASE by mid-November.

data.title: Taco Bell introduces Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito, a spicy and cheesy innovation. Feed your fiery side!
data.description: Introducing Taco Bell's latest creation, the Flamin' Hot® Grilled Cheese Burrito! Designed for flavor enthusiasts, this bold dish combines cheesy goodness with spicy kick. Embark on a flavorful journey with this new innovation, bringing together iconic flavors in Taco Bell's signature style. Unleash your fiery side and indulge in the deliciously daring Flamin' Hot® Grilled Cheese Burrito today.

data.title: Nasdaq leads gains as Nvidia chipmaker jumps; Taiwan Semiconductor and Snowflake in focus. Dow Jones rose on Thursday.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase, with Taiwan Semiconductor, a chipmaker for Nvidia, surging on positive earnings. The Nasdaq led gains in the stock market. Specifically, Taiwan Semiconductor's jump was notable among the news of the day. Snowflake also made headlines with its entry into the market. These updates were covered live by Investor's Business Daily, providing real-time information on the stock market trends.

data.title: GDT named 2025 IoT Innovator by CRN for outstanding contributions to enterprise IoT market.
data.description: In Dallas on October 16, 2025, GDT revealed it was recognized as one of CRN's 2025 IoT Innovators, showcasing its significant impact on the enterprise Internet of Things (IoT) market. This accolade celebrates solution providers like GDT for their outstanding contributions.

data.title: BLS International secures 3-year contract to run Indian Visa Application Centres in China for Ministry of External Affairs, India.
data.description: BLS International, based in New Delhi, India, has secured a significant contract from the Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India. The prestigious contract spans three years and underscores the company's commitment to providing essential services.

data.title: HPE and Ericsson set up lab for telco providers, validating dual-mode 5G core solution, helping deploy efficient networks.
data.description: Houston and Stockholm - HPE (Hewlett Packard Enterprise), with the ticker symbol HPE on NYSE, and Ericsson have revealed a new joint validation lab to address key obstacles encountered by telecommunication service providers. The lab aims to assist in the deployment of a multi-vendor infrastructure stack. This collaboration seeks to validate a cloud-native, artificial intelligence-driven, dual-mode 5G core solution. Telecommunication companies are increasingly required to set up robust, scalable, and productive networks while handling the challenges of implementing new technologies.

data.title: Rain partners with Paylocity, providing EWA solution to 41,650 Paylocity clients, benefitting 3.5M workers.
data.description: In Los Angeles today, Rain, a prominent provider of earned wage access (EWA) solutions, unveiled its latest integration with Paylocity, a top HR, payroll, and spend management platform. The collaboration means that Paylocity's vast network of 41,650 clients will now be able to utilize a seamless earned wage access solution available through the platform's integrations marketplace. This innovative bi-directional integration allows the employees of Paylocity customers to join the 3.5 million workers who already benefit from Rain's services.

data.title: Indji Systems Inc. secures new U.S. patent (US12380794B2) for "Alert Generation System and Method" for renewable energy and utility networks.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Indji Systems Inc. unveiled that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office has approved US12380794B2, labeled "Alert Generation System and Method," adding to their intellectual property portfolio that includes US10089854B2. This patent offers enhanced protection for advancements that support renewable energy and electrical network operators nationwide. The Indji Watch™ SaaS platform by Indji Systems Inc. remains a leader in the market.

data.title: Bermuda updates laws (Trustee Amendment Act 2025, Benefit Entities Act 2025) to promote responsible wealth stewardship.
data.description: Bermuda has recently passed two significant acts - the Trustee Amendment Act 2025 and the Benefit Entities Act 2025. These acts, effective as of October 16, 2025, aim to facilitate wealth and business owners in creating long-term resilience through sustainable business practices and responsible investing within trusts. This development presents an opportunity for individuals and entities to engage in more sustainable and responsible economic activities.
